Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: root
Message:
feat: dashboard metrica historica, CLI, proxy subdominios, template auto-assign

- DeploymentHistoryChart: grafico de deploys por dia (sucesso/falha)
- LiveMetrics: CPU/RAM em tempo real no detail do projeto
- DeployLogViewer + DeployProgress: logs WebSocket com progress bar
- CLI nidus: login, deploy, logs, env, db (npm global)
- Proxy reverso Go: slug.nidus.app roteia para container correto
- Caddy wildcard *.nidus.app aponta para proxy
- Fix: template auto-assign (codigo no if errado)
- Fix: port binding 0.0.0.0, detectFramework express, getExposedPort

Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: Mateus Siqueira
Message:
feat: Nidus Mail API + MCP, metrics history, Grafana dashboards, security hardening

## New Features
- Nidus Mail: transactional email API (send, templates, logs) + MCP server
- Metrics History: Prometheus query_range endpoint (CPU/Memory time-series)
- Dashboard Charts: recharts LineCharts on project detail page
- Grafana per-project: template variable filtering by container name
- Grafana provisioning dashboard Nidus Platform (5 panels)

## Security
- Caddy headers: HSTS, X-Frame-Options DENY, nosniff
- broto-postgres bound to 127.0.0.1
- Landing page moved to /var/www/ (caddy user access)
- Test containers with public ports cleaned up

## Fixes
- Managed DB: name sanitization (unicode, hyphen->underscore)
- Metrics: heapAlloc/heapTotal bug (Go MemStats)
- Deployment: mail.Init nil pointer crash
- Landing page: 403->200 (permissions)
